creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Olli,

I am looking for a repository of some kind for spamd in order to look for adding IPv6 support to it.  Unfortunately, the SF account only has tarballs, and the link to the upstream project on the SF web site only has a blank page, and I could not find any repository :-(.

Do you know how to proceed to contribute to this software?

Thanks!
